vo_commander_greeting.text: Commander on deck. All units, report status.

vo_match_started.text: Match initiated. Establish your base and secure Cordite nodes.

vo_base_under_attack.text: Warning! Our base is under attack!

vo_unit_ready.text: Unit production complete. Ready for deployment.

vo_insufficient_funds.text: Insufficient Cordite. Secure more resource nodes.

vo_upgrade_complete.text: Upgrade research complete. New capabilities online.

vo_victory.text: All enemy forces eliminated. Victory is ours!

vo_defeat.text: Our base has been destroyed. Mission failed.
